
At a Glance
=====================================

Row
-------------------------------------

### Spawning Biomass, Recruitment, and Harvest Rate

```{r at_a_glance_stack}
# Three-panel vertical stack:
# 1. Spawning biomass with scaled survey indices
# 2. Recruitment with R0 reference line
# 3. Legal harvest rate with Umsy + catch bars

# --- Panel 1: SB with index overlay ---
sb        <- mv$spawning_biomass
sb_stks   <- if ("stock" %in% names(sb) && length(unique(sb$stock)) > 1L) unique(sb$stock) else NULL
stock_pal <- c("#1f77b4", "#ff7f0e", "#2ca02c", "#d62728", "#9467bd")
p_sb <- plot_ly()
for (s_i in seq_along(if (!is.null(sb_stks)) sb_stks else list(NULL))) {
  stk_s  <- if (!is.null(sb_stks)) sb_stks[s_i] else NULL
  sub_sb <- if (!is.null(stk_s)) sb[sb$stock == stk_s, , drop = FALSE] else sb
  sub_sb <- sub_sb[order(sub_sb$year), , drop = FALSE]
  col_s  <- stock_pal[((s_i - 1L) %% length(stock_pal)) + 1L]
  lbl_s  <- if (!is.null(stk_s)) stk_s else "Spawning biomass"
  has_sb_ci <- "lwr" %in% names(sub_sb) && any(!is.na(sub_sb$lwr))
  if (has_sb_ci) {
    p_sb <- add_ribbons(
      p = p_sb, x = sub_sb$year, ymin = sub_sb$lwr, ymax = sub_sb$upr,
      line = list(width = 0), fillcolor = "rgba(31,119,180,0.2)",
      showlegend = FALSE, hoverinfo = "skip"
    )
  }
  p_sb <- add_lines(
    p = p_sb, x = sub_sb$year, y = sub_sb$est,
    line = list(color = col_s, width = 2), name = lbl_s,
    hovertemplate = paste0(lbl_s, " %{x}: %{y:.3g}<extra></extra>")
  )
}

# Overlay scaled survey indices if vulnerable biomass
# and index data available
if (!is.null(mv$vulnerable_biomass) &&
    !is.null(mv$index_fits)) {
  sc <- mv_fleet_colours(fleet_names = survey_fleets)
  for (sf in survey_fleets) {
    idx_sub <- mv$index_fits[
      mv$index_fits$fleet == sf &
        !is.na(mv$index_fits$obs),
      , drop = FALSE
    ]
    vb_sub <- mv$vulnerable_biomass[
      mv$vulnerable_biomass$fleet == sf,
      , drop = FALSE
    ]
    if (nrow(idx_sub) == 0 || nrow(vb_sub) == 0) next
    # Scale index to SB scale using mean ratio
    merged <- merge(
      x = idx_sub[, c("year", "obs")],
      y = vb_sub[, c("year", "est")],
      by = "year"
    )
    merged <- merged[merged$obs > 0, , drop = FALSE]
    if (nrow(merged) == 0) next
    q_hat <- mean(merged$obs / merged$est, na.rm = TRUE)
    scaled_idx <- idx_sub$obs / q_hat
    p_sb <- add_markers(
      p = p_sb,
      x = idx_sub$year, y = scaled_idx,
      name = sf,
      marker = list(
        color = sc[sf], size = 5,
        line = list(color = "white", width = 0.5)
      ),
      hovertemplate = paste0(
        sf, " %{x}: %{y:.3g}<extra></extra>"
      )
    )
  }
}

lay_sb <- modelVis::mv_layout()
lay_sb$yaxis$title <- "Spawning biomass"
lay_sb$showlegend <- TRUE

p_sb <- do.call(
  what = layout, args = c(list(p = p_sb), lay_sb)
)

# --- Panel 2: Recruitment ---
rec      <- mv$recruitment
rec_stks <- if ("stock" %in% names(rec) && length(unique(rec$stock)) > 1L) unique(rec$stock) else NULL
p_rec <- plot_ly()
for (s_i in seq_along(if (!is.null(rec_stks)) rec_stks else list(NULL))) {
  stk_r   <- if (!is.null(rec_stks)) rec_stks[s_i] else NULL
  sub_rec <- if (!is.null(stk_r)) rec[rec$stock == stk_r, , drop = FALSE] else rec
  sub_rec <- sub_rec[order(sub_rec$year), , drop = FALSE]
  col_r   <- stock_pal[((s_i - 1L) %% length(stock_pal)) + 1L]
  lbl_r   <- if (!is.null(stk_r)) stk_r else "Recruitment"
  has_rec_ci <- "lwr" %in% names(sub_rec) && any(!is.na(sub_rec$lwr))
  if (has_rec_ci) {
    p_rec <- add_ribbons(
      p = p_rec, x = sub_rec$year, ymin = sub_rec$lwr, ymax = sub_rec$upr,
      line = list(width = 0), fillcolor = "rgba(44,160,44,0.2)",
      showlegend = FALSE, hoverinfo = "skip"
    )
  }
  p_rec <- add_lines(
    p = p_rec, x = sub_rec$year, y = sub_rec$est,
    line = list(color = col_r, width = 2), name = lbl_r,
    showlegend = FALSE,  # stock names already shown in SB panel legend
    hovertemplate = paste0(lbl_r, " %{x}: %{y:.3g}<extra></extra>")
  )
}

# R0 reference line
rec_shapes <- list()
if (!is.null(mv$sr_params) &&
    !is.null(mv$sr_params$R0)) {
  rec_shapes <- list(list(
    type = "line",
    x0 = min(years), x1 = max(years),
    y0 = mv$sr_params$R0, y1 = mv$sr_params$R0,
    line = list(
      color = "#999999", width = 1.5, dash = "dash"
    )
  ))
}
lay_rec <- modelVis::mv_layout()
lay_rec$yaxis$title <- "Recruitment"
lay_rec$shapes <- rec_shapes
lay_rec$showlegend <- FALSE

p_rec <- do.call(
  what = layout, args = c(list(p = p_rec), lay_rec)
)

# --- Panel 3: Harvest rate with catch bars ---
# Use harvest_rate (new slot) with fallback to
# legal_hr (legacy slot) for backwards compat
hr <- mv$harvest_rate
if (is.null(hr)) hr <- mv$legal_hr
hr_label <- meta$hr_label
if (is.null(hr_label)) hr_label <- "Harvest rate"

p_hr <- plot_ly()

# Catch bars (background)
if (!is.null(mv$landed_catch_total)) {
  ct <- mv$landed_catch_total
  p_hr <- add_bars(
    p = p_hr,
    x = ct$year, y = ct$est,
    marker = list(color = "rgba(200,200,200,0.4)"),
    name = "Catch", yaxis = "y2",
    hovertemplate = paste0(
      "Catch %{x}: %{y:.3g}<extra></extra>"
    )
  )
}

# Primary HR line: per fleet, averaged over stocks when multi-stock
if (!is.null(hr)) {
  hr_fl_names <- if ("fleet" %in% names(hr)) unique(hr$fleet) else "fleet"
  for (fl_i in seq_along(hr_fl_names)) {
    fl    <- hr_fl_names[fl_i]
    hr_fl <- if ("fleet" %in% names(hr)) hr[hr$fleet == fl, , drop = FALSE] else hr
    if ("stock" %in% names(hr_fl) && length(unique(hr_fl$stock)) > 1L) {
      hr_agg       <- aggregate(est ~ year, data = hr_fl, FUN = mean)
      hr_agg$fleet <- fl
      hr_fl        <- hr_agg
    }
    hr_fl     <- hr_fl[order(hr_fl$year), , drop = FALSE]
    has_hr_ci <- "lwr" %in% names(hr_fl) && any(!is.na(hr_fl$lwr))
    if (has_hr_ci) {
      p_hr <- add_ribbons(
        p = p_hr, x = hr_fl$year, ymin = hr_fl$lwr, ymax = hr_fl$upr,
        line = list(width = 0), fillcolor = "rgba(31,119,180,0.2)",
        showlegend = FALSE, hoverinfo = "skip"
      )
    }
    hr_col <- stock_pal[((fl_i - 1L) %% length(stock_pal)) + 1L]
    p_hr <- add_lines(
      p = p_hr, x = hr_fl$year, y = hr_fl$est,
      line = list(color = hr_col, width = 2),
      name = if (length(hr_fl_names) > 1L) fl else hr_label,
      showlegend = length(hr_fl_names) > 1L,
      hovertemplate = paste0(fl, " %{x}: %{y:.4f}<extra></extra>")
    )
  }
}

# Secondary HR (e.g., sublegal discard rate)
hr2 <- mv$harvest_rate_secondary
if (!is.null(hr2)) {
  hr2_label <- meta$hr_secondary_label
  if (is.null(hr2_label))
    hr2_label <- "Secondary harvest rate"
  p_hr <- add_lines(
    p = p_hr,
    x = hr2$year, y = hr2$est,
    line = list(
      color = "#ff7f0e", width = 2, dash = "dash"
    ),
    name = hr2_label, showlegend = TRUE,
    hovertemplate = paste0(
      hr2_label, " %{x}: %{y:.4f}<extra></extra>"
    )
  )
}

# Umsy reference line
hr_shapes <- list()
if (has_refpts && !is.null(mv$ref_points$lUmsy)) {
  hr_shapes <- list(list(
    type = "line",
    x0 = min(years), x1 = max(years),
    y0 = mv$ref_points$lUmsy,
    y1 = mv$ref_points$lUmsy,
    line = list(
      color = "#999999", width = 1.5, dash = "dash"
    )
  ))
}

lay_hr <- modelVis::mv_layout()
lay_hr$xaxis$title <- "Year"
lay_hr$yaxis$title <- hr_label
lay_hr$yaxis2 <- list(
  overlaying = "y", side = "right",
  title = "Catch", showgrid = FALSE
)
lay_hr$shapes <- hr_shapes
lay_hr$showlegend <- !is.null(hr2)
lay_hr$barmode <- "overlay"

p_hr <- do.call(
  what = layout, args = c(list(p = p_hr), lay_hr)
)

# Stack all three
p_out <- subplot(
  p_sb, p_rec, p_hr,
  nrows = 3, shareX = TRUE,
  titleX = TRUE, titleY = TRUE,
  heights = c(0.4, 0.3, 0.3),
  margin = 0.04
)
# Ensure legend box is visible (shows stock names from SB panel)
p_out <- layout(p = p_out, showlegend = !is.null(sb_stks))
modelVis::mv_config(p = p_out)
```

Row {.tabset}
-------------------------------------

### All Biomass Components

```{r all_bio}
p <- plot_ly()

# Spawning biomass (per stock when multi-stock)
sb       <- mv$spawning_biomass
sb_stks2 <- if ("stock" %in% names(sb) && length(unique(sb$stock)) > 1L) unique(sb$stock) else NULL
sb_pal2  <- c("#d62728", "#1f77b4", "#ff7f0e", "#2ca02c", "#9467bd")
for (s_i in seq_along(if (!is.null(sb_stks2)) sb_stks2 else list(NULL))) {
  stk_s2  <- if (!is.null(sb_stks2)) sb_stks2[s_i] else NULL
  sub_sb2 <- if (!is.null(stk_s2)) sb[sb$stock == stk_s2, , drop = FALSE] else sb
  sub_sb2 <- sub_sb2[order(sub_sb2$year), , drop = FALSE]
  col_s2  <- sb_pal2[((s_i - 1L) %% length(sb_pal2)) + 1L]
  lbl_s2  <- if (!is.null(stk_s2)) paste("Spawning -", stk_s2) else "Spawning"
  has_sb_ci2 <- "lwr" %in% names(sub_sb2) && any(!is.na(sub_sb2$lwr))
  if (has_sb_ci2) {
    p <- add_ribbons(
      p = p, x = sub_sb2$year, ymin = sub_sb2$lwr, ymax = sub_sb2$upr,
      fillcolor = "rgba(214,39,40,0.15)", line = list(width = 0),
      showlegend = FALSE, hoverinfo = "skip"
    )
  }
  p <- add_lines(
    p = p, x = sub_sb2$year, y = sub_sb2$est,
    line = list(color = col_s2, width = 2), name = lbl_s2,
    hovertemplate = paste0(lbl_s2, " %{x}: %{y:.3g}<extra></extra>")
  )
}

# Legal biomass
if (!is.null(mv$legal_biomass)) {
  lb <- mv$legal_biomass
  p <- add_lines(
    p = p, x = lb$year, y = lb$est,
    line = list(color = "#1f77b4", width = 2),
    name = "Legal",
    hovertemplate = paste0(
      "Legal B %{x}: %{y:.3g}<extra></extra>"
    )
  )
}

# Sublegal biomass
if (!is.null(mv$sublegal_biomass)) {
  slb <- mv$sublegal_biomass
  p <- add_lines(
    p = p, x = slb$year, y = slb$est,
    line = list(color = "#ff7f0e", width = 2),
    name = "Sublegal",
    hovertemplate = paste0(
      "Sublegal B %{x}: %{y:.3g}<extra></extra>"
    )
  )
}

# Total biomass (per stock when multi-stock)
if (!is.null(mv$total_biomass)) {
  tb      <- mv$total_biomass
  tb_stks <- if ("stock" %in% names(tb) && length(unique(tb$stock)) > 1L) unique(tb$stock) else NULL
  for (s_i in seq_along(if (!is.null(tb_stks)) tb_stks else list(NULL))) {
    stk_t  <- if (!is.null(tb_stks)) tb_stks[s_i] else NULL
    sub_tb <- if (!is.null(stk_t)) tb[tb$stock == stk_t, , drop = FALSE] else tb
    sub_tb <- sub_tb[order(sub_tb$year), , drop = FALSE]
    lbl_t  <- if (!is.null(stk_t)) paste("Total -", stk_t) else "Total"
    col_t  <- sb_pal2[((s_i - 1L) %% length(sb_pal2)) + 1L]
    p <- add_lines(
      p = p, x = sub_tb$year, y = sub_tb$est,
      line = list(color = col_t, width = 2, dash = "dot"),
      name = lbl_t,
      hovertemplate = paste0(lbl_t, " %{x}: %{y:.3g}<extra></extra>")
    )
  }
}

lay <- modelVis::mv_layout()
lay$xaxis$title <- "Year"
lay$yaxis$title <- "Biomass"
lay$showlegend <- TRUE
lay$updatemenus <- mv_log_linear_buttons()

p <- do.call(
  what = layout, args = c(list(p = p), lay)
)
modelVis::mv_config(p = p)
```
